evals.prompt: Create a PRD for a new user notifications feature.
evals.expected_output: Enter Discovery Phase: ask 3-5 clarifying questions with options. (a) Platform: Web/Mobile/Both? (b) Notification types: in-app/email/push? (c) Real-time or batched? (d) User preferences/opt-out required? (e) Target user roles? Repeat until Actionable State reached, then draft to docs/specs/prd-user-notifications.md.

evals.prompt: I need a spec for making the app faster.
evals.expected_output: Violation: 'faster' is vague. Apply No Vagueness rule: ask for measurable targets. 'Fast' -> 'Load time < 200ms'. Discovery questions: (a) Which pages/flows are slow? (b) Current measured baseline? (c) Target SLA? (d) Platform? Map answers to non-functional requirements section of PRD template.

evals.prompt: Draft requirements for a payment checkout flow.
evals.expected_output: Discovery Phase: ask about payment providers (Stripe/PayPal), currencies supported, guest vs. account checkout, 3DS requirements, refund flows, mobile vs. web. Verification checklist: functional flows defined, edge cases (failed payment, timeout, duplicate submit), security requirements (PCI compliance), performance targets. Write to docs/specs/prd-checkout-flow.md.

should_not_trigger: Create a BRD for reducing claims processing cost
Write an SRS for payment retry state transitions
Design architecture for event-driven order sync
Write a Go function to parse JSON
Add unit tests for the auth service
